name: Medium Plastic Bathroom Tray - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your bathroom counter clutter-free and clean with the help of this Medium Plastic Bathroom Tray from Brightroom™. Showcasing a cubical silhouette with raised sides, this plastic bathroom tray features an open-top design to let you easily access the contents while keeping them off wet bathroom counters or sinks. Showcasing a sleek, transparent design, it adds contemporary charm to your bathroom decor. Coordinate it with similar bath or vanity accessories for a cohesive look.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
